title: 6 Stocks to Buy to Hedge Your Portfolio in a Down Market
text: These six stocks to buy will help you hedge your portfolio through their dividend yields and low P/E valuations. The post 6 Stocks to Buy to Hedge Your Portfolio in a Down Market appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: 6 Dividend Stocks to Buy Now to Weather the Coming Recession
text: These six dividend stocks have steady earnings growth prospects, low P/Es, and good dividend yields, allowing them to weather a recession. The post 6 Dividend Stocks to Buy Now to Weather the Coming Recession appeared first on InvestorPlace.

title: Edison International (EIX) Q1 Earnings Beat, Sales Rise Y/Y
text: Edison International's (EIX) first-quarter 2022 adjusted earnings surpass the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 44.6%. Revenues improve by 34.1% on a year-over-year basis.

title: Edison International's (EIX) CEO Pedro Pizarro on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Edison International (NYSE:EIX ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call May 3, 2022 4:30 PM ET Company Participants Sam Ramraj - Vice President, Investor Relations Pedro Pizarro - President and Chief Executive Officer Maria Rigatti - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Steve Powell - President, CEO, Southern California Edison Adam Umanoff - General Counsel Conference Call Participants Shar Pourreza - Guggenheim Partners Steve Fleishman - Wolfe Research Ryan Levine - Citi Sophie Karp - KeyBanc Jonathan Arnold - Vertical Research Partners Michael Lapides - Goldman Sachs Gregg Orrill - UBS Richard Sutherland - JPMorgan Chase Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Disclaimer*: This transcript is designed to be used alongside the freely available audio recording on this page. Timestamps within the transcript are designed to help you navigate the audio should the corresponding text be unclear.

title: Utility Stocks Q1 Earnings Due on May 3: CNP, EIX & More
text: Total Q1 earnings of Utility stocks are expected to increase 9.3% year over year, while revenues are likely to decline 8%. CNP, EIX, CMS, PEG & CPK are set to report Q1 results on May 3
